# Instructor for PHP

> Structured data extraction in PHP, powered by LLMs. Define a PHP class, get a validated object back.

## Main

- [Overview](/llms/index.md)
- [Getting Started](/llms/getting-started.md)
- [Features](/llms/features.md)
- [Packages](/llms/packages.md)
- [Use Cases](/llms/use-cases.md)
- [Why Instructor](/llms/why-instructor.md)

- [Break Down Reasoning Into Multiple Steps](/llms/cookbook/examples/Z05_SelfCriticism/break_down_reasoning.md)
